title: Maximum of Minimums for Every Window Size

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Maximum of Minimums for Every Window Size". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
content.inputFormat: The input is an array of integers.
content.outputFormat: The output is an array of integers where each element at index i represents the maximum of minimums for every window size i+1.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a sliding window approach to calculate the minimum for each window size and keep track of the maximum of these minimums.
